description: Synchronize runtime/package/project/docs/tests at 0.3.2, update live Hermes proof instructions, and prepare an annotated hotfix tag without rewriting v0.3.1.
acceptance: Runtime, package, project contract, current docs, and version-sensitive tests consistently declare 0.3.2/v0.3.2.
v0.3.1 remains unchanged and release-check 0.3.2 is green before publication.

evidence.summary: RED: public version contract test expected 0.3.2 and observed 0.3.1. GREEN: runtime/package/project/current docs/tests and live Hermes v032 paths synchronized. Verification: focused version test, 75-test check-linux, template pairing, standalone distribution, and diverse pilots passed.
